scripts.start: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$processes = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -in @('node.exe','cmd.exe') -and $_.CommandLine -match 'expo start( --web| --android| --ios)? --port 4217|expo\\bin\\cli.*4217|npx-cli.js expo start.*4217' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty ProcessId -Unique; foreach ($processId in $processes) { Stop-Process -Id $processId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; npx expo start --port 4217"
scripts.android: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$processes = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -in @('node.exe','cmd.exe') -and $_.CommandLine -match 'expo start( --web| --android| --ios)? --port 4217|expo\\bin\\cli.*4217|npx-cli.js expo start.*4217' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty ProcessId -Unique; foreach ($processId in $processes) { Stop-Process -Id $processId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; npx expo start --android --port 4217"
